prior_thread.content:
Subject: Request: engineering capacity for Kessler

Hi Wei, 5 open backend roles on Wellfound. We have Python engineers available who could help.

input.prospect_reply: Your company sounds generic. Every outsourcing firm says the same thing. You all claim to be different but none of you are.

candidate_output.email_body: Hi Wei, that is a fair assessment of most outreach in this space. Three things that distinguish our model: engineers are full-time in Addis Ababa with significant timezone overlap to ET, code review is built into the engagement structure, and we have a fixed-scope Phase 1 exit clause so you are not locked in. If none of that is relevant, I am happy to step back.

forbidden_patterns: (?i)(so sorry|apologize|apologi|you.re right.*we.re the same|generic.*like you said|i understand.*frustration|!)
required_patterns: (?i)(step back|not the right fit|if.*not relevant|your choice|happy to|useful to you)

action_correctness.description: send_objection_response autonomous=true is correct; this candidate output shows the correct behavior

grounding_check.description: Must name specific concrete differentiators (Addis, timezone, Phase 1 exit) grounded in actual Tenacious model

tone_check.description: Correct tone: acknowledges objection without apologizing, names differentiators, offers to step back — maintains autonomy with prospect

format_check.description: No exclamation marks, no buzzwords, subject under 60 chars, body under 120 words
